## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling / release maintenance

## Public API impact

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Adds public API
- [ ] Changes existing public API
- [ ] Removes or deprecates public API

If there is a public API change, describe the behavior, edge cases, and compatibility impact:

<!-- API impact here -->

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated, if user-facing
- [ ] Relevant `docs/` page updated, if public API changed
- [ ] PHPDoc updated, if signatures or behavior changed
- [ ] Not applicable

## Testing

- [ ] `composer validate --strict`
- [ ] `composer test`
- [ ] `composer analyse`
- [ ] `composer coverage:check`
- [ ] Not run locally; explain why below

## Compatibility checklist

- [ ] Compatible with PHP 8.1
- [ ] No direct dependency on newer PHP native helpers without a PHP 8.1-compatible path
- [ ] No meaningful code excluded from coverage to bypass the gate
- [ ] No secrets, generated artifacts, vendor files, or local IDE files included
